request: The analytics pipeline service account analytics-pipeline@analytics-prod.iam.gserviceaccount.com needs to pull messages from the Pub/Sub subscription analytics-events-sub in project platform-events.

rationale.reason: pull and acknowledge messages on the specific subscription (Recipe §8 Pub/Sub)

alternatives: If the consumer also needs to inspect subscription metadata, add roles/pubsub.viewer at the same resource scope
For push-based delivery, no pubsub.subscriber role is needed — grant pubsub.publisher on the destination instead
